name: Induced & Restricted Representations
description: Res_H^G V, Ind_H^G W = kG⊗_{kH} W. Frobenius reciprocity: Hom_G(Ind W, V) ≅ Hom_H(W, Res V). Mackey formula.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Restriction\nRes_H V from G"]
    D2["Def: Induction\nInd_H W = kG⊗W"]
    D3["Def: Coinduction\nCoind = Hom_H kG, W"]
    D4["Def: Trivial rep\n1_H on H"]
    T1["Thm: Frobenius reciprocity\nHom Ind, V ≅ Hom W, Res"]
    T2["Thm: Ind 1_H = perm rep\non G/H"]
    T3["Thm: Mackey formula\nRes Ind decomp"]
    T4["Thm: Transitivity\nInd_K^G Ind_H^K = Ind_H^G"]
    T5["Thm: Dim Ind W\n= [G:H] dim W"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D4 --> T2
    D2 --> T3
    D2 --> T4
    D2 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
